data.body:
Decision log (vars 10-12):
10. TICKET_CMD — REMOVE (dead bash-era test-injection seam in validate; never set; validate reads in-process).
11. REBAR_SIGNING_KEY — KEEP (HMAC signing secret; correctly env-sourced; on-convention; per-env fallback).
12. COMPACT_THRESHOLD — MODIFY: rename REBAR_COMPACT_THRESHOLD + expose as [tool.rebar] compact.threshold config key (env overrides file; alias old). PATTERN: tuning settings -> config key + REBAR_-prefixed env override + alias.
